arts.ttl: Celtic's Champions League earnings so far compared to Rangers in Europa League, the gulf is vast
arts.sum: So far, Celtic have beaten the likes of RB Leipzig, Slovan Bratislava and Young Boys whilst earning impressive draws against last season’s Europa League winners, Atalanta and Belgian and Croatian champions Club Brugge and Dinamo Zagreb as Celtic cruised into the Champions League playoff places. After eight games, 12 points and Celtic finishing above the likes of Man City, the Parkhead club has earned a fortune from their performances in UEFA’s top competition.

arts.ttl: Rangers and Celtic GROUND SHARE floated as Ibrox women's chief reckons new stadium could spark Hampden flit
arts.sum: Donald Gillies, managing director for the Light Blues women's team, reckons a multi-use arena could help game

arts.ttl: Sarpsborg chief responds to rejected Orjasaeter Celtic transfer offer but with caveat
arts.sum: Sarpsborg chief responds to rejected Orjasaeter Celtic transfer offer but with caveat

arts.ttl: Loan deal for Kieran Tierney Celtic alternative to move elsewhere 'collapses'
arts.sum: Tyrell Malacia's loan switch to Benfica has collapsed amid reported Celtic interest.

arts.ttl: Loudmouth Bayern Munich hero claims Celtic tie is easiest in Champions League
arts.sum: Loudmouth Lothar Matthaus reckons Bayern Munich have landed the easiest draw in the Champions League by being paired with Celtic.

arts.ttl: Motherwell 0 Celtic 0 LIVE score and goal updates from the Premiership clash at Fir Park
arts.sum: The champions make the short trip to Lanarkshire to take on the managerless Steelmen

arts.ttl: West Ham make £500k bid after terms agreed with young Celtic talent
arts.sum: West Ham United are pushing to sign Celtic prospect Daniel Cummings before the end of the winter transfer window.

arts.ttl: Celtic read out final David Strelec transfer rules as in-demand striker will smash all-time transfer record
arts.sum: A striker is top of the Celtic shopping list with time rapidly running out in the winter window

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers urged to pick Celtic star who could make Premier League move
arts.sum: The good thing to come out of all of this was Rodgers bringing on the Celtic young guns, including striker Daniel Cummings for his debut. But, after that, there isn’t a senior out-and-out striker for the manager to pick from and Stephen McGinn wants Cummings to earn more game time, as he told Go Radio.

arts.ttl: Luis Palma breaks silence as he reveals what 'motivated' his Celtic exit to Olympiacos
arts.sum: Luis Palma left Celtic for Olympiacos on loan until the end of the season. Palma told Olympiacos FC on social media, “I am very happy and pleased to be in this great team.
